summary: Non-functional deliverable. Workflow references non-existent tests/aggregate.bats and fixtures/ (workflow fails at line 37 'Run bats unit tests'). Script suppresses errors via `|| true` in main() function (line ~213), hiding markdown generation failures. Actionlint installed but never validated (lines 25–26 install, no execution step). No input validation. Embedded polyglot code (Python/jq heredocs) reduces modularity.
